form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at this track 0 - 64 November 15 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Prince Ruban carrying 61kg at $6. First up last campaign fifth of 8 at this track Hcp June 21 over 1000m, 6 len behind Flying Annie with 55kg at $7. Certainly one to consider.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last of 7 at this track 0 - 70 on March 27 over 1200m, 13 len behind Atlantic Ocean carrying 58.5kg at $10. Before that won by 3.5 len at this track 0 - 64 March 6 over 1100m defeating Brat with 60kg at $2.35. Poor run last time but he is better than that.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation fifth of 7 at Doomben Bm68 January 29 over 1200m, 6 len behind Abender with 57kg at $14. form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation fourth in a small field at this track 0 - 64 September 26 over 1300m, 5 len behind The Girl's Boy carrying 60kg at $13. Previous preparation first-up won by long-neck Eagle Farm Bm62 September 28 2024 over 1200m slow track defeating Outburst with 61kg at $5. Hard to enthuse.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Impeded from heels and steadied approaching the 200m.
Held up rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months won by 1.3 len at this track Bm54 March 27 over 1200m defeating Straya Pride with 60kg at $8.50. Previously second-up won by 0.8 len at this track Cl2 November 4 over 1100m defeating Peace Baby carrying 57kg at $4.60. Improver with winning prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded for room and eased near the 700m.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 7 at this track 0 - 70 on March 27 over 1200m, 6 len behind Atlantic Ocean carrying 55kg at $9.50. The start before that 5th of 9 at this track 0 - 64 on February 14 over 1100m, 4 len behind Lochlorian carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. Can improve again. Top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Taken inwards by another runner passing the 100m.
Veered outwards at the start and bumped.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation post a big 4 len win. This track 0 - 58 December 27 over 1000m defeating Juelene carrying 55.5kg at $4.80. Previously first up; ran last in a small field at this track 0 - 58 September 20 over 1000m, 13 len behind Polarising carrying 59kg at $4. Solid top-three proposition.
